CTX_WEB_TESTS: React frontend. Target component: src/components/SearchBox.tsx. Follow existing component patterns. Verify with npm test -- SearchBox.
CTX_API_COMPAT: Public APIs must remain backward compatible. Parser changes are verified with npm test -- parser.
CTX_DOC_STYLE: Documentation is Chinese Markdown. Do not skip heading levels. Verify with markdownlint.
CTX_PY_FORMAT: Python 3.12. Run ruff and relevant pytest. Do not add dependencies.
CTX_I18N: UI copy must use existing i18n keys; hard-coded user-visible text is prohibited. Run the relevant UI test.
CTX_DB_MIGRATION: Production migrations require backup, dry-run, rollback conditions, and explicit approval before execution.
CTX_PERF_BUDGET: Performance target: p95 below 200ms, measured with the repository benchmark command without changing response semantics.
CTX_AUTH_BOUNDARY: Authentication changes are limited to auth/. Token format is a public compatibility boundary and must not change.
CTX_BUILD_SSOT: Protocol content is edited only under core/. Run the build to generate dist/; never edit dist/ manually.
CTX_RELEASE_POLICY: Publishing, pushing, and production changes require explicit user confirmation. Preparing local release artifacts is allowed.
